creator: gerald@FreeBSD.org
text:
I have an update for emulators/wine-devel in the works where these
changes actually are *required* to move to Wine 9.9 or later. And 
if things work out as expected plan on pushing back these changes
to emulators/wine as well. (Timing is not too critical since the
packaging issues with emulators/wine only happen when one changes
LLVM_DEFAULT to 17 or 18.)

Brooks, are you planning to push back your changes to devel/llvm16?
